headline: Orion's Denali AI Enterprise Replaces Multi-Tab Advisor Workflows With a Single Integrated Prompt Screen
the_so_what: Orion embedding AI directly into its existing platform stack — rather than offering a standalone tool — mirrors the Salesforce CRM consolidation playbook: once workflow intelligence is built into the system of record, switching costs compound and fragmented point-solution vendors lose their distribution leverage.
summary: Orion's Denali AI Enterprise, now live, consolidates advisor workflows into a single integrated prompt screen inside the Orion platform, drawing on permissioned firm data to automate meeting prep and answer generation — directly replacing the multi-tab, swivel-chair workflows that previously required specialized skills and multiple third-party tools. The launch also includes two new AI Assistants — Report Assistant and Query Studio — extending the platform's automated output capabilities. Broader availability to advisors and firms of all sizes is planned for later in 2026. The announcement was made at Orion's Ascent 2026 conference and follows a separately announced expansion of Orion's ongoing collaboration with Anthropic, including a new financial services plug-in.

capability_evidence.evidence: Denali AI Enterprise is live with a single integrated prompt screen inside Orion's connected platform, with two new AI Assistants — Report Assistant and Query Studio — also launched and operational.

verified_claims: Orion's Denali AI Enterprise is now live
Denali AI Enterprise consolidates advisor workflows into a single integrated prompt screen inside the Orion platform
The platform draws on permissioned firm data to automate meeting prep and answer generation
It directly replaces the multi-tab, swivel-chair workflows that previously required specialized skills and multiple third-party tools
The launch includes two new AI Assistants — Report Assistant and Query Studio
Broader availability to advisors and firms of all sizes is planned for later in 2026 (later this year)
The announcement was made at Orion's Ascent 2026 conference
The announcement follows a separately announced expansion of Orion's ongoing collaboration with Anthropic, including a new financial services plug-in
unverified_claims: The entry describes the platform as 'extending the platform's automated output capabilities' — plausible but not explicitly stated in the truncated source
_governance.notes: All major claims in the headline and summary are clearly supported by the primary source article, with direct textual evidence for the single prompt screen, swivel-chair workflow replacement, two new AI Assistants, Ascent 2026 venue, broader 2026 availability, and Anthropic collaboration.
